# CWE-290 — Authentication Bypass by Spoofing (vulnerable) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-290-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

// Vulnerable: trusts X-Remote-User from the client instead of server session state.
func IdentityHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	if r.Method != http.MethodGet {
		http.Error(w, "method not allowed", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)
		return
	}
	user := r.Header.Get("X-Remote-User")
	if user == "" {
		http.Error(w, "anonymous", http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"user": user})
}
